description_long: This is a medium-sized, polygonal wooden barrel with a slightly tapered cylindrical shape and an open top. The exterior is finished in a light brown wood texture, with two prominent gray metallic bands encircling the upper and lower thirds of the barrel, providing structural reinforcement. The rim of the barrel is uneven, featuring a small notch or chip, adding a sense of wear or use. The interior appears hollow, suggesting it is designed to hold or store materials. The surface of the wood is matte and subtly rough, while the metallic bands have a dull, slightly reflective finish. There are no visible handles, labels, or decorative markings on the exterior.
description: A polygonal wooden barrel with two gray metal bands and an open, notched top. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with no handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top with a visible notch and both gray metal bands clearly encircling the barrel.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the notched rim and the polygonal shape of the barrel's body.
description_view_2: Side view with the open top and both metal bands visible, showing the continuous wood texture.
description_view_3: Rear view with the open top and metal bands, no additional features or markings visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: gray metal hoops at top and bottom
